reviews.review_description:
This game feels extremely low-effort. The physics are poor, the graphics are unimpressive, and the NPCs are very limited. There’s no multiplayer mode, no story mode, and only a handful of maps, most of which feel empty and lacking in content. The prison map is a good example of this.

There are only a few NPCs in the entire game, which makes the experience feel repetitive very quickly. After playing for a while, I found there wasn't much to do.

I genuinely regret buying this game. In my opinion, it is not worth the price at all. I would strongly recommend saving your money instead of spending it on this.

If you've seen YouTubers having fun with it, keep in mind that they're often creating entertaining content for their audience. My personal experience was far less enjoyable.

Overall, I cannot recommend this game. The lack of content, limited features, and overall quality made it a disappointing purchase for me.

developer_response.body:
Sorry you felt that way. But I assure you that yoy won't regret buying it.

I'm constantly working on the game and updating every NPC with expressions. A lot of new content is planned.

Stay tune, new updates will be fun. Soon, I will be launching bank map.

reviews.review_title: Newton's Playground: Garry's Mod Of VR
reviews.review_description:
If you used to spend hours messing around in GMod, just get this. It’s literally GMod in VR.
The tool gun mechanics feel so natural, you can freeze and scale random props and it just works. You can build the dumbest-looking cars out of junk and actually drive them, and the ragdolls are hilarious. Honestly, just messing around and breaking stuff in the maps is the best part.
It doesn't try to force a story or anything, it just lets you do whatever. 10/10, honestly so fun.

This game is amazing but it needs some more updates. reviews.review_title: Adding blood and gore was unnecessary
reviews.review_description:
I got this game a while back because it was the only good 13+ sandbox game that wasn’t insanely bloody and gory.￼ Ever since the blood and gore update came out, the age rating was set to 17+ , not allowing anybody below 17 to play.￼ I don’t really get the reason behind this, you’re just limiting the amount of people that￼ could play your game.
It’s a great game, I just want a refund now that I can’t play anymore.￼￼￼

This development makes a great game￼ the developer puts time and effort into everything every game. Anything you can name they do well, and I am proud to say this game is perfect in every way, cause they listen to their community unlike so many￼ others

I suggest adding a "Multi-functional Interactive Watch" for the player. This tool would act as a central hub for controlling time, tracking NPCs, and managing logistics, significantly enhancing the sandbox experimentation experience.
​Key Features:
​Time Control Interface:
​Allows players to set the cycle of day and night.
​Customizable time scale settings (e.g., input ratio: "5 real-life seconds = 1 in-game minute").
​NPC Tracking & Interaction System:
​Infinite Tracker Supply: Players can spawn unlimited trackers (various designs/shapes) from the watch.
​Live Monitoring: Pressing the tracking button opens a large UI showing the positions of all tracked NPCs.
​Live Feed & Targeting: Clicking on a specific tracker allows the player to view the NPC's live POV. Players can also lock-on targets (e.g., Policeman, Missiles) to the NPC. Once the NPC detects the target, they enter an "evasion mode," adding dynamic pursuit gameplay.
​Logistics/Transport Call:
​Players can summon vehicles directly to a destination.
​Can transport the player plus up to two NPCs at once.
​NPC Customization:
​Includes a built-in menu to create and customize NPC attributes, skins, or behaviors directly from the watch.
​Why this is great:
This tool centralizes complex mechanics into a single, immersive wearable device. It eliminates the need to constantly navigate through menus, allowing for smoother, more cinematic gameplay—perfect for content creators filming series like The Bad Luck Diary.

reviews.review_description: This game is good but I think there should be a few more maps and the game could be a bit more realistic please. Also, I think there should be a multiplayer mode in it so you can play with friends.

This is my favourite game on the vr store, literally because i never got bored of this! The maps, npc's and tools are amazing. It is also really creative because you can shrink the npc's make new objects change textures and even test npc's!

It’s a great game to play if you’re feeling creative. I love how you can do almost anything you want (emphasis on ”almost”) 
I hope to see more maps, objects, and NPCs in the future. Possibly mods as well. Also different ways to interact with the NPCs. 
For those who enjoy “Garry’s Mod”, I highly recommend this game. 
I’d say give this one a try! :)
